overall.description: Underwater exploration gameplay from Subnautica showing a player approaching a large cylindrical base structure in a small submarine, then exiting to swim freely around the base and explore the surrounding coral reef environment with rock formations and marine life.

scene_state.functional_zone: underwater base approach in small submarine

agents.ego_description: piloting the underwater vehicle toward the large cylindrical base structure on the seafloor

entered.detail: multi-story cylindrical underwater habitat with stacked circular modules and external hatches
flat white foundation structure with geometric patterns serving as the base landing pad
tall swaying underwater vegetation with dark green fronds
horizontal cylindrical corridor connecting base modules

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a large cylindrical underwater base structure in a small submarine. Tall kelp plants sway on the left while the multi-story metal base tower rises ahead, with connecting tubes visible to the right. The seafloor is sandy with sparse vegetation.

events.description: begins ascending and circling around the cylindrical base structure to view upper modules

agents.ego_description: maneuvering the submarine upward around the tower, circling to get a better view of the upper base modules and observation deck

entered.detail: circular platform extending from the main tower with glass windows
top sections of the cylindrical tower with hatches and antennae

segments.scene_description: The player circles the base in the submarine, ascending around the tall cylindrical tower. The observation deck becomes visible on the right side as the camera moves upward, while the base platform passes out of view behind. Sunlight filters down from the surface creating a dappled lighting effect.

scene_state.functional_zone: underwater base exterior swimming with handheld lights

events.description: exits the underwater vehicle and begins swimming freely with handheld lights illuminating the surroundings

agents.ego_description: swimming away from the vehicle and exploring the base exterior, using handheld lights to illuminate the structures and nearby rocks

entered.detail: large moss-covered rock formation with coral growths adjacent to the base
smaller auxiliary base structures and habitat modules
small schools of fish swimming in the open water

segments.scene_description: The player exits the vehicle and begins swimming freely around the base exterior. Handheld lights illuminate the rocky outcrops and base modules. The tall cylindrical base moves to the right background as the player explores the surrounding area, with small fish visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow coral reef with rock arches and formations

events.description: moves away from the base into the open reef environment with natural rock arches and coral formations

agents.ego_description: swimming through the coral reef, examining rock arches and schools of small fish while moving away from the base

entered.detail: natural stone archway formation covered in coral and marine growth
colorful coral clusters with pink and purple hues growing on rocks
large school of small silver fish swimming in formation

segments.scene_description: The player swims away from the base into the open reef environment. Natural rock arches and colorful coral formations dominate the foreground, while schools of fish swim through the water. The base structure fades into the distance as the exploration continues through the sandy reef area with scattered vegetation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a structured industrial outpost into the wild expanse of a vibrant coral reef. It begins with a small submarine approaching a towering cylindrical metal base, gliding past swaying kelp plants and connecting tubes on a sandy seafloor. As the vehicle circles and ascends the tower, the perspective shifts upward toward an observation deck while dappled sunlight filters down from the surface. The scene then transitions as the player exits the submarine to swim freely, using handheld lights to illuminate rocky outcrops while the base recedes into the background. Finally, the camera moves away from the structure entirely, drifting through natural rock arches and colorful coral formations populated by schools of fish in the open reef.
